## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Superhuman and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, reporting, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is ramping up content production, with 20+ articles ready for publication this week](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Superhuman to share a repository of current visual assets (GIFs, images, videos) for use in content](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Upcoming Superhuman initiatives include AI features launch, analytics dashboard, and webinars](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Looker Studio dashboard for tracking content performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [First batch of content published last week](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [20+ more articles ready for publication this week](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Early signs show good impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Typical trajectory: 20-50 clicks/week by month 2, 200+ clicks/week by early month 3](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

### Visual Asset Sharing

  - [GrowthX requested a file with Superhuman's key visual assets (GIFs, images, videos)](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Alex to share GIF library from Dropbox, noting some design inconsistencies](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [YouTube videos available, including 1-minute product walkthroughs](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Alex to compile best, most current assets in shared Notion doc](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)

### Upcoming Superhuman Initiatives

  - [AI features general availability launch in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - ["Summer of AI" campaign starting in July](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [6 product launches planned for the quarter, focusing on AI, calendar, and analytics dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Monthly webinars: April (AI inbox), May (Superhuman for Startups), June (AI-native productivity)](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

### Content Opportunities

  - [Potential to create SEO-rich articles from podcast/video transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Explore leveraging Rahul's (CEO) frequent podcast guest appearances](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Build content clusters around product launches and campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [GrowthX to set up Looker Studio dashboard using Google Search Console and Analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Dashboard to include:](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
      - [Performance by page and topical clusters](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
      - [AI search referrals (e.g., Perplexity, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
      - [Top-level organic search metrics](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Superhuman to handle conversion impact tracking internally](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Collaboration needed to align on key questions for consistent reporting](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

### Superhuman Product Experience

  - [Elvis shared positive feedback on using Superhuman](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Team discussed inbox zero strategies and productivity benefits](https://fathom.video/share/RCD7-41xtHTn5Ba3FxqDQG97oKbUb__a?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
